message:
fix: add missing window_id and tab_id fields to PaneRecord test constructors

PaneRecord gained window_id: Option<u64> and tab_id: Option<u64> fields
but 3 test constructors in main.rs were not updated.

cargo check --workspace --tests now passes with 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39188,6 +39188,8 @@ recorder_backend = "frankensqlite"
                             pane_id,
                             pane_uuid: Some("local-gap-pane".to_string()),
                             domain: "local".to_string(),
+                            window_id: None,
+                            tab_id: None,
                             title: Some("local-gap-pane".to_string()),
                             cwd: Some("/tmp".to_string()),
                             tty_name: None,
@@ -39333,6 +39335,8 @@ recorder_backend = "frankensqlite"
                             pane_id,
                             pane_uuid: Some("local-gap-pane-equal-ts".to_string()),
                             domain: "local".to_string(),
+                            window_id: None,
+                            tab_id: None,
                             title: Some("local-gap-pane-equal-ts".to_string()),
                             cwd: Some("/tmp".to_string()),
                             tty_name: None,
@@ -39483,6 +39487,8 @@ recorder_backend = "frankensqlite"
                             pane_id,
                             pane_uuid: Some("local-gap-cursor-pane".to_string()),
                             domain: "local".to_string(),
+                            window_id: None,
+                            tab_id: None,
                             title: Some("local-gap-cursor-pane".to_string()),
                             cwd: Some("/tmp".to_string()),
                             tty_name: None,
